project_context.name: The Founding Builders
project_context.tagline: Help Bring Places Back To Life
project_context.description: A gamified pre-launch experience for Building Culture Dollar ($BCD) token. Mix of Duolingo, Clash of Clans, and Farcaster. Transforms visitors into active community members through XP and quests.

theme_archetype.vibe: Premium, mysterious, rewarding, gamified web3, high engagement.

buttons.primary: Use TouchableOpacity wrapping a LinearGradient (Gold or Emerald) with primary inverse text (Black) and pill border-radius. Add scale animation on press.
buttons.secondary: Use TouchableOpacity with glassmorphic BlurView or solid Charcoal background and thin white/10 border.
buttons.glass: Use expo-blur (BlurView) with 'dark' tint and border-radius. Use exclusively for overlapping modals and overlays to maintain high contrast.

cards.quest_card: Deep charcoal surface, thin white border (1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05)), rounded-2xl. Use subtle gold/emerald gradient borders for completed states.

navigation.bottom_tab: Glassmorphism BlurView tab bar anchored to bottom. Use soft blue accents for active states. Haptic feedback on switch.

progress_bars.xp_bar: Container view with 16px radius, dark background. Inner view with LinearGradient (emerald_growth), animated width using Reanimated.

splash_hero.layout: Fullscreen background image (village_abandoned) with dark overlay gradient.
splash_hero.content: Massive countdown timer in Gold. Headline: 'Building Culture Dollar Launch'. Subhead: 'The community is rebuilding the future...'.

onboarding.layout: Bottom sheet or modal over splash.
onboarding.content: Auth inputs (username, email, password), Referral code input. Clean dark UI with high-contrast text inputs.

home_dashboard.header: Avatar, Username, Level Badge, and progress bar to next level.
home_dashboard.hero_visual: The Village - crossfade or swap village states based on global community progress (abandoned -> thriving).
home_dashboard.mayor_greeting: Floating AI Mayor avatar with soft blue chat bubble offering today's tip.
home_dashboard.quick_actions: Horizontal scroll of today's Daily Quests.

quests_missions.ecosystem_quests: List of apps (BC App, BC ID, WohnAI, etc.) with 'Visit (+50 XP)' buttons.
quests_missions.global_missions: Massive shared progress bar for all users (e.g., 'Restore the Park: 45,000/100,000 Actions').

inventory_spin.layout: Bento-style grid for Keys (Builder, Culture, Vision, Founder).
inventory_spin.spin_wheel: Large 3D wheel asset, 'Spin (1 Free/Day)' CTA. Result overlay with Mystery Box.

leaderboard.layout: Tabs: Global XP, Top Referrers, Weekly.
leaderboard.content: Ranked list. Top 3 have special Gold/Emerald/Blue halos.

profile.layout: Avatar profile picture, Founding Score metric, XP metric.
profile.referral: Big share block with code and 'Share on X/Farcaster' buttons.

social_feed.content: Live ticker/feed of actions: 'User123 just earned a Founder Key!', 'The Café has been restored!'

images.description: Starting state of the village. Use on splash and early game.
Fully restored village. Use for high-level players, launch day, and global mission success states.
Mayor Culture avatar. Use next to tooltips and onboarding chat bubbles.
Visual asset for the Founder Key or top-tier rewards.
Loot box visual for Spin the Wheel results or daily rewards.
The Spin the Wheel graphic for the daily spin tab.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: This is an Expo React Native app. Do NOT use HTML tags (<div>, <span>) or Tailwind CSS classes directly in the components unless specifically configured through NativeWind. Assume pure StyleSheet by default unless NativeWind is present.
Use 'react-native-reanimated' for fluid, 60fps gesture and entrance animations.
Use 'expo-blur' <BlurView> for glassmorphism panels. Set tint='dark' and specify intensity.
Apply test IDs to EVERY interactive or key metric element. Use testID='id' for React Native and data-testid='id' if web support is required via React Native for Web (or add both to be safe).
Use StyleSheet.create for styling, avoiding inline styles where possible.
Mobile-first responsive means relying on flexbox (flex: 1), percentage widths, and Dimensions API where necessary.
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image URLs. Only use the media URLs provided in this JSON.
Set the countdown timer to exactly May 30, 2026 12:00:00 UTC.
